shots.caption: Bubblewire: one live social command center.
shots.narration: This is Bubblewire: a live social command center for the places market culture actually happens.

shots.caption: Twitch, X, Kick, and X Live in one feed.
shots.narration: Instead of four tabs and four kinds of chaos, Bubblewire brings Twitch, X, Kick, and X Live into one labeled stream.

shots.caption: The source label is not cosmetic.
shots.narration: The label is not cosmetic. Every item keeps its source, author, timestamp, mode, raw payload, and proof state.

shots.caption: Filter by platform and search the room.
shots.narration: Now it becomes an operator surface. Filter by platform, search the room, and keep the whole audience in context.

shots.caption: Author drill-down without losing context.
shots.narration: Click any author to isolate their signal, then clear back to the full cross-platform flow.

shots.caption: Watchlists catch moments before they pass.
shots.narration: Watchlist terms flag matching rows, raise toasts, and help moderators catch the moments that matter.

shots.caption: Heat, mood, trends, and questions surface signal.
shots.narration: The app reads the room too: volume spikes, heat, mood, trends, and questions surface before they scroll away.

shots.caption: Provider reality, not demo theater.
shots.narration: Bubblewire is honest about provider reality: X is filtered posts, Kick is webhook events, and credentials stay server-side.

shots.caption: Make the aggregator you actually want.
shots.narration: Then you make it yours: choose sources, themes, watchlists, overlay size, fade, alignment, and filters.

shots.caption: The moment, the proof, the broadcast.
shots.narration: Bubblewire captures the moment, the proof, and the broadcast in one customizable aggregator.
